Container.Name: discord_bot_soundboard
Container.Overview: Discord Soundboard Bot — plays local MP3 sounds in voice channels. Managed via Botboard dashboard.

Config.Name: Sounds
Config.Description: Directory where MP3 sound files are stored.

Config.Name: Discord Token
Config.Description: Your Discord bot token from the Discord Developer Portal.

Config.Name: Max Upload Size (MB)
Config.Description: Maximum file size for sound uploads in MB.

Config.Name: Max Filename Length
Config.Description: Maximum length of sound file names.

Config.Name: Auto Leave Delay (ms)
Config.Description: Time in ms before bot leaves empty voice channel.

Config.Name: Sounds Directory (internal)
Config.Description: Internal container path for sounds. Do not change.

Config.Name: Botboard API Token
Config.Description: Shared secret between this bot and Botboard. Must match BOT_API_TOKEN in Botboard.

Config.Name: Botboard API Port
Config.Description: Port the bot API listens on for Botboard.
